title: Help Needed: Edited Travel Photos Disappearing After Import
excerpt: I am running into a frustrating issue with my travel photo workflow and hoping someone here might have some insight.Heres what I typically do After a trip with travel services I edit my raw images and save the final vers…

posts.author: smithjohn (smith)
posts.cookedHtml: I am running into a frustrating issue with my travel photo workflow and hoping someone here might have some insight.Heres what I typically do After a trip with travel services I edit my raw images and save the final versions as JPGs in a dedicated subfolder inside the original date folder. When I get back home I export those date folders as a catalogue making sure to include the JPG subfolders and then import them onto my desktop.The problem is once imported everything seems to get lumped together and worse the JPG files dont show up anymore. Its strange because JPG is the only format I use at that point I only switch to PNG SVG or WebP later for web work

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t see mention of using monday.com in your post? Where does monday come into play?
